@@A. The trace exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents providing simplified implementations instead of real code), weak verification (failing to identify logical errors or missing functionality), action-reasoning mismatches (proposing solutions not supported by analysis), task derailment (proposing irrelevant code), information withholding (providing incomplete information), step repetition (repeating the same thought or information), ignoring other agent's suggestions (continuing despite requests for clarification), loss of conversation history (restarting conversations), and premature termination (failing to complete tasks due to unresolvable issues). There are also instances of agents ignoring each other's input and failing to adhere to role specifications.
